---
title: An empirical approach for the prediction of daily mean PM10 concentrations
date: '2002-01-01'
author:
- G.W. Fuller
- D.C. Carslaw
- H.W. Lodge
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## An empirical approach for the prediction of daily mean PM10 concentrations

<p class="pub-meta">G.W. Fuller, D.C. Carslaw, H.W. Lodge</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2002


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2002.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
